method: GSQ K=32 + V18-C low-rank correction (rank=32) + per-block(64) absmax
reconstruction: W_full = grid[codes] * absmax + alpha * U @ V (bit-identical, SHA-256 verified)

eval_methodology.device: cuda:0 or cuda:1 (single 32 GB consumer GPU)

provenance_audit.policy: Every entry in verified_records[] MUST carry an explicit sources.{baseline_json,compressed_json} pair (or a single-source compressed_json containing both baseline_ppl and compressed_ppl) so scripts/verify_all_benchmarks.py can recompute the ratio from disk. Entries that cannot be reconciled to on-disk source JSONs live in pending_provenance[] until re-evaluated.
provenance_audit.single_source_note: Where the source JSON is a unified PPL_EVAL_*.json or STREAM_COMPRESS_E2E_*_NEW_FULL_PPL.json that contains both baseline_ppl AND compressed_ppl in one file, sources.baseline_json and sources.compressed_json point to the same file; the verifier resolves baseline_ppl from the compressed JSON in that case (see _ratio_from_sources in scripts/verify_all_benchmarks.py).

sources.discovery_note: the auto-discovered candidate scripts/overlay/artifacts/streaming_compression_qwen3-1.7b-base_eval_only.json is the v4d-multipass run (computes 1.00499) and is NOT the canonical source; verifier must use the explicit path above

verified_records.note: essentially tied with small-decoder record at 14B scale
baseline + compressed produced on cuda:1 RTX 5090 single-GPU via per-layer streaming; same n_eval/seq_len/seed across both runs

pending_provenance.search_summary: no PPL_EVAL_mamba* / STREAM_COMPRESS_E2E_MAMBA* / streaming_*_mamba*.json located in docs/ or scripts/overlay/artifacts/ as of 2026-05-10. Only BENCHMARKS_2026_05_08.json carries the rounded numbers; underlying eval JSON appears to have not been archived. Existing on-disk Mamba assets are exploratory _test_mamba_*.py / _test_mamba_*.log scripts and a tokenized calibration set (fineweb_edu_10M_tokens_mamba_2_8b_hf.pt) — no PPL ratio output JSON.
pending_provenance.sip_decision_required: RE_RUN_EVAL_TO_PRODUCE_SOURCE_JSON (preferred — artifact = first public SSM lossless 5-bit compression and worth defending) OR DEMOTE_FROM_VERIFIED_RECORDS_PERMANENTLY (acceptable if Mamba is no longer publicly cited)

candidate_files_examined: docs/STREAM_COMPRESS_E2E_QWEN3_17B_NEW_FULL_PPL.json (n_eval=30, seq_len=1024, baseline=18.232, compressed=18.375, ratio=1.00782) — closest matching eval config but ratio is 1.00782, NOT 1.02
pending_provenance.search_summary: no on-disk JSON with baseline_ppl=18.0145 was located. The closest-matching apples-to-apples eval (NEW_FULL n_eval=30 seq_len=1024) computes 1.0078, not the canonical 1.02. The 1.02 number originated from BENCHMARKS_2026_05_08.json with a different baseline (18.0145) whose source eval was not archived to docs/.
pending_provenance.sip_decision_required: RE_RUN_EVAL_TO_RECONCILE (run NEW_FULL eval and either confirm 1.0078 — which would beat the published 1.02 and is friendlier to UC — or pin down what produced 18.0145) OR PROMOTE_NEW_FULL_RESULT_AND_UPDATE_PPL_RATIO_TO_1.0078 (use the actual on-disk source and update the canonical number; this would also propagate to HF model card and any public surfaces citing 1.02)

highlights: V4-D Multi-Pass Cascade Correction REFUTED (PPL 1.0682x; pass-1 cannot recover info pass-0 discarded)
V3 rank-redistribute REFUTED (PPL 1.0702x; shallow-rank starvation cascades errors through network)
Per-Linear adaptive bpw v1 REFUTED apples-to-apples (1.005097 vs uniform 1.004876)
V18-C train_steps depth-adaptive v2 within noise (1.00451 vs 1.00488)
rank/train_steps push: 1.0040x is the empirical floor for V18-C on Qwen3-1.7B-Base
V18-C SVD warm-start NEGATIVE (worse than random init)
Base/instruct PPL hypothesis REFUTED 2/3 of archs

Mistral-7B-v0.3 streaming logit-KL v7 (depth-banded steps 200/300/400/600 × r48): 1.0820× — REFUTED. Adaptive train_steps WORSE than uniform v6b (1.0502×). Early-layer step cuts corrupted prefix cache for downstream.
Mistral-7B-v0.3 streaming logit-KL v8 (300 steps × depth-banded rank 32/48/64/80): 1.0896× — REFUTED. Worst yet. Depth-banding hypothesis class is wrong for streaming logit-KL on Mistral.

competitive_intel.conclusion: Sipsa Labs is the first-mover in 5-bit lossless transformer compression on the public HF Hub. The 5-bit lossless band is empty.

uc_bench_subcommand.purpose: Customer self-service measurement of TTFT, tokens/sec, decode-TPS, peak VRAM on any UC pack
